ddls:
CREATE TABLE "application_components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application component */,
  "component_name" TEXT /* Name of the application component */,
  "component_type" TEXT /* Type of the application component */,
  "component_size" INTEGER /* Size of the application component */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value for the application component */,
  "java_name" TEXT /* Java name for the application component */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the component */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the component was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the component */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the component */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the component */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the component is active */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the component */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_attributes" (
  "attribute_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attribute */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application component the attribute belongs to */,
  "attribute_name" TEXT /* Name of the attribute */,
  "attribute_type" TEXT /* Type of the attribute */,
  "attribute_size" INTEGER /* Size of the attribute */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value for the attribute */,
  "is_primary_key" INTEGER /* Indicates if the attribute is a primary key */,
  "is_foreign_key" INTEGER /* Indicates if the attribute is a foreign key */,
  "is_not_null" INTEGER /* Indicates if the attribute is not nullable */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the attribute */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the attribute */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the attribute was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the attribute */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the attribute */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the attribute */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the attribute is active */,
  "max_length" INTEGER /* Maximum length for the attribute */,
  "min_length" INTEGER /* Minimum length for the attribute */,
  "regex_pattern" TEXT /* Regular expression pattern for validation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attribute_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_attributes_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES application_components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_objects" (
  "object_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each object */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application component the object belongs to */,
  "object_name" TEXT /* Name of the object */,
  "object_type" TEXT /* Type of the object */,
  "object_size" INTEGER /* Size of the object */,
  "is_primary_key" INTEGER /* Indicates if the object is a primary key */,
  "is_foreign_key" INTEGER /* Indicates if the object is a foreign key */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the object */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the object */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the object was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the object */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the object */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the object */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the object is active */,
  "max_value" TEXT /* Maximum value for the object */,
  "min_value" TEXT /* Minimum value for the object */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the object */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("object_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_objects_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES application_components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application component the group belongs to */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the group */,
  "group_description" TEXT /* Description of the group */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the group */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the group was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the group */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the group */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the group */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the group is active */,
  "group_type" TEXT /* Type of the group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_groups_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES application_components ("component_id")
)
